files.patch:
@@ -361,6 +361,7 @@ final class AppShellSupportTests: XCTestCase {
         let firstWindow = try XCTUnwrap(manager.currentWindow)
 
         XCTAssertEqual(firstWindow.title, "Ghost Pepper Settings")
+        XCTAssertEqual(firstWindow.frame.size, NSSize(width: 960, height: 720))
         XCTAssertEqual(firstWindow.minSize, NSSize(width: 900, height: 680))
         XCTAssertFalse(firstWindow.isReleasedWhenClosed)
         XCTAssertEqual(NSApp.activationPolicy(), .regular)

@@ -41,12 +41,37 @@ smoke_prepare_home "$SMOKE_HOME"
 smoke_reset_defaults_domain
 smoke_write_bool_default onboardingCompleted true
 
+window_size() {
+  local pid="$1"
+  local window_title="$2"
+
+  osascript - "$pid" "$window_title" <<'APPLESCRIPT'
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+  set expectedWindowTitle to item 2 of argv
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    tell first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+      tell window expectedWindowTitle
+        set {windowWidth, windowHeight} to size
+        return (windowWidth as text) & "," & (windowHeight as text)
+      end tell
+    end tell
+  end tell
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
 BEFORE_CRASH="$(smoke_latest_crash_report)"
 APP_PID="$(smoke_launch_app --env "GHOST_PEPPER_LAUNCH_ACTION=$ACTION")"
 
 case "$ACTION" in
   settings)
     smoke_wait_for_window "$APP_PID" "Ghost Pepper Settings"
+    IFS=',' read -r window_width window_height <<< "$(window_size "$APP_PID" "Ghost Pepper Settings")"
+    if [[ "$window_width" -lt 900 || "$window_height" -lt 680 ]]; then
+      smoke_fail "GhostPepper opened Settings at ${window_width}x${window_height}, below the minimum supported size"
+    fi
     for _ in $(seq 1 20); do
       smoke_process_exists "$APP_PID" || smoke_fail "GhostPepper exited after opening Settings"
       sleep 0.25
